name: Turtle Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Finely grind cookies in a processor.
3. Blend in melted butter.
4. Press the crumb mixture onto the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch-diameter springform pan with 2 3/4-inch-high sides.
5. Wrap the outside of the springform pan with foil.
Filling:
1. Using an electric mixer, beat cream cheese in a large bowl until fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until smooth.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time.
4. Mix in vanilla extract.
5. Bring cream to a simmer in a heavy small saucepan.
6. Reduce heat to low and add chocolate; stir until the mixture is melted and smooth.
7. Pour half of the cream cheese mixture into the crust.
8. Spoon half of the chocolate mixture over the filling by tablespoons, spacing evenly.
9. Using the tip of a knife, swirl the chocolate mixture into the filling.
10. Spoon the remaining cream cheese mixture over the top.
11. Spoon the remaining chocolate mixture over the top by tablespoons.
12. Swirl the chocolate into the filling.
1. Bake until the sides are set and the center moves slightly when the pan is shaken (about 1 hour 5 minutes). The cake may crack.
2. Cool in the pan on a rack.
3. Chill overnight.
Caramel Sauce:
1. Using a small knife, cut around the pan sides to loosen the cake.
2. Release the pan sides.
3. Drizzle 1/4 cup caramel sauce over the top of the cake.
4. Garnish with whole pecans.
5. Pass remaining sauce separately.
